title: Supervised content revenue research and draft pipeline
objective: Research one content niche and prepare a reviewable local content experiment packet.
revenue_hypothesis: Useful, original content may create audience and monetization opportunities after human review and manual publishing.
approval_gates: human approval before choosing a niche
human approval before any future publish or account action

tasks.description: Prepare source-linked niche and audience-problem notes.
Find relevant local Ghoti memory pointers.
Prepare a local draft, hook options, and shot-list outline.
Review originality, evidence, safety, and quality.
Choose whether to continue manually; no publish occurs.
